requirement_topic.en: Energy Performance / MEPS — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Rwanda RSB-adopted RS/IEC 62552 + minimum energy performance standards)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效性能/最低能效标准——家用制冷器具（卢旺达RSB采纳的RS/IEC 62552 + 最低能效标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效性能/最低能效標準——家用製冷器具（盧旺達RSB採納的RS/IEC 62552 + 最低能效標準）

summary.en: Rwanda's energy performance requirements for refrigerating appliances are administered by the Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) and the national energy/standards programmes, using minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and a test methodology based on the international IEC 62552 series (national adoption RS/IEC 62552 — Household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods). Rwanda participates in East African Community (EAC) and regional efforts to harmonise appliance energy efficiency, and refrigerator energy performance is verified within the RSB conformity-assessment / PVoC route. Where a MEPS floor applies, an appliance below the minimum energy efficiency value cannot be imported; energy performance data must be generated by IEC 62552 testing, not the Chinese GB methodology. The exact in-force MEPS value, label format, and effective dates should be confirmed directly with RSB and the relevant Rwandan energy authority, as regional MEPS programmes are updated periodically.
summary.zh: 卢旺达制冷器具的能效性能要求由卢旺达标准局（RSB）及国家能源/标准计划管理，采用最低能效标准（MEPS）及基于国际IEC 62552系列的试验方法（国家采纳RS/IEC 62552——家用制冷器具——特性和试验方法）。卢旺达参与东非共同体（EAC）及区域协调器具能效的工作，电冰箱能效性能在RSB合格评定/PVoC路径内验证。在适用MEPS下限的情况下，低于最低能效值的器具不得进口；能效数据须由IEC 62552试验产生，而非中国GB方法。具体在用MEPS值、标签格式及生效日期应直接向RSB及卢旺达相关能源主管部门确认，因区域MEPS计划会定期更新。
summary.zht: 盧旺達製冷器具的能效性能要求由盧旺達標準局（RSB）及國家能源/標準計畫管理，採用最低能效標準（MEPS）及基於國際IEC 62552系列的試驗方法（國家採納RS/IEC 62552——家用製冷器具——特性和試驗方法）。盧旺達參與東非共同體（EAC）及區域協調器具能效的工作，電冰箱能效性能在RSB合格評定/PVoC路徑內驗證。在適用MEPS下限的情況下，低於最低能效值的器具不得進口；能效數據須由IEC 62552試驗產生，而非中國GB方法。具體在用MEPS值、標籤格式及生效日期應直接向RSB及盧旺達相關能源主管部門確認，因區域MEPS計畫會定期更新。

standards_or_laws: RS/IEC 62552 series (national adoption of IEC 62552-1/-2/-3) — Household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods (basis for energy performance measurement)
Rwanda minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for refrigerating appliances — administered by RSB and the national energy/standards programme; aligned with EAC regional harmonisation
RSB PVoC / Certificate of Conformity — energy performance verified within the per-consignment conformity assessment

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits, enforced by SAMR under the China Energy Label (CEL) system administered with NDRC. The underlying test method (GB/T 8059, aligned with the IEC 62552 series) is technically close to Rwanda's IEC-based methodology, but the Chinese grade scale and threshold values are not the same instrument as a Rwanda MEPS floor — a Chinese Grade 1/2 rating does not by itself prove the appliance meets Rwanda's minimum energy value, which must be demonstrated on IEC 62552 results assessed by/for RSB.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过与国家发展改革委（NDRC）共同管理的中国能效标识（CEL）制度执行。底层试验方法（GB/T 8059，与IEC 62552系列一致）在技术上接近卢旺达基于IEC的方法，但中国等级标尺及门槛值与卢旺达MEPS下限并非同一工具——中国1级/2级评定本身不能证明器具达到卢旺达最低能效值，后者须以经RSB评定的IEC 62552结果证明。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過與國家發展改革委（NDRC）共同管理的中國能效標識（CEL）制度執行。底層試驗方法（GB/T 8059，與IEC 62552系列一致）在技術上接近盧旺達基於IEC的方法，但中國等級標尺及門檻值與盧旺達MEPS下限並非同一工具——中國1級/2級評定本身不能證明器具達到盧旺達最低能效值，後者須以經RSB評定的IEC 62552結果證明。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two practical gaps for the energy dimension: (1) MEPS floor vs grade scale — Rwanda applies (or is moving to) a minimum energy performance value an appliance must clear to be imported; a Chinese GB 12021.2 grade is not interchangeable, so the exporter must confirm the appliance's IEC 62552 annual energy consumption against the current Rwanda MEPS value, not rely on its Chinese grade. (2) Test-basis and reporting — Rwanda accepts IEC 62552-based results; while China's GB/T 8059 is aligned with IEC 62552, the report presented to RSB should be on the IEC 62552 basis (ideally from an ILAC MRA / IECEE-recognised lab) and cover the model variants shipped. Note: Rwanda's exact MEPS threshold, label graphic, and effective date for refrigerators must be verified with RSB — regional EAC MEPS values change and a stale figure could wrongly clear or fail a model.
gap.zh: 能效维度的两个实务差距：（1）MEPS下限与等级标尺——卢旺达适用（或正转向）一个器具须达到方可进口的最低能效值；中国GB 12021.2等级不可互换，因此出口商须将器具的IEC 62552年耗电量与现行卢旺达MEPS值比对，而非依赖其中国等级。（2）试验基准与报告——卢旺达接受基于IEC 62552的结果；虽然中国GB/T 8059与IEC 62552一致，但提交RSB的报告应基于IEC 62552（最好来自ILAC MRA/IECEE认可实验室）并覆盖所发运的型号变体。注：卢旺达电冰箱的具体MEPS门槛、标签图形及生效日期须向RSB核实——区域EAC MEPS值会变化，过时数据可能错误地通过或否决某型号。
gap.zht: 能效維度的兩個實務差距：（1）MEPS下限與等級標尺——盧旺達適用（或正轉向）一個器具須達到方可進口的最低能效值；中國GB 12021.2等級不可互換，因此出口商須將器具的IEC 62552年耗電量與現行盧旺達MEPS值比對，而非依賴其中國等級。（2）試驗基準與報告——盧旺達接受基於IEC 62552的結果；雖然中國GB/T 8059與IEC 62552一致，但提交RSB的報告應基於IEC 62552（最好來自ILAC MRA/IECEE認可實驗室）並覆蓋所發運的型號變體。註：盧旺達電冰箱的具體MEPS門檻、標籤圖形及生效日期須向RSB核實——區域EAC MEPS值會變化，過時數據可能錯誤地通過或否決某型號。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a MEPS floor is in force — appliances below the minimum energy performance value cannot be imported; energy performance assessed on RS/IEC 62552 results within the RSB conformity-assessment / PVoC route. Exact threshold and effective date to be confirmed with RSB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Rwanda verifies refrigerator energy performance against RSB-adopted RS/IEC 62552 test methods and a minimum energy performance standard (MEPS), assessed inside the PVoC / Certificate of Conformity. A Chinese GB 12021.2 grade does not substitute — the exporter must confirm IEC 62552 annual energy consumption against the current Rwanda MEPS value. verified:false — the exact in-force MEPS threshold, label, and date must be confirmed with RSB and the national energy authority.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达依据RSB采纳的RS/IEC 62552试验方法及最低能效标准（MEPS）验证电冰箱能效，并在PVoC/合格证书内评估。中国GB 12021.2等级不能替代——出口商须将IEC 62552年耗电量与现行卢旺达MEPS值比对。verified:false——具体在用MEPS门槛、标签及日期须向RSB及国家能源主管部门确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達依據RSB採納的RS/IEC 62552試驗方法及最低能效標準（MEPS）驗證電冰箱能效，並在PVoC/合格證書內評估。中國GB 12021.2等級不能替代——出口商須將IEC 62552年耗電量與現行盧旺達MEPS值比對。verified:false——具體在用MEPS門檻、標籤及日期須向RSB及國家能源主管部門確認。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Rwanda Appliance Energy Label vs China Energy Label (no EU-style EPREL registry)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——卢旺达器具能效标签与中国能效标识对比（无类似欧盟的EPREL数据库）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——盧旺達器具能效標籤與中國能效標識對比（無類似歐盟的EPREL數據庫）

summary.en: Where Rwanda operates an appliance energy label for refrigerating appliances, it is administered by RSB / the national energy programme and is displayed on the product at point of sale, with the energy class/value derived from RS/IEC 62552 testing. Rwanda does not operate a centralised pre-market product registry equivalent to the EU's EPREL — there is no Rwanda obligation to pre-register each model in an online database with a machine-readable label file before shipment; instead the energy claim is substantiated through the RSB conformity-assessment / PVoC process and the physical label. The label format, class scale, and whether display is mandatory for a given product category should be confirmed with RSB, since Rwanda harmonises appliance labelling regionally through the EAC and the precise scheme can differ from both the EU A–G label and the Chinese 1–5 grade.
summary.zh: 在卢旺达对制冷器具实行器具能效标签的情况下，该标签由RSB/国家能源计划管理，在销售点贴于产品上，能效等级/数值源自RS/IEC 62552试验。卢旺达不设类似欧盟EPREL的集中式市场前产品注册数据库——卢旺达没有在出货前将每款型号连同机器可读标签文件预先在在线数据库注册的义务；能效声明通过RSB合格评定/PVoC流程及实体标签予以证实。标签格式、等级标尺，以及某产品类别是否强制展示，应向RSB确认，因卢旺达通过EAC在区域层面协调器具标识，具体方案可能与欧盟A–G标签及中国1–5级均不同。
summary.zht: 在盧旺達對製冷器具實行器具能效標籤的情況下，該標籤由RSB/國家能源計畫管理，在銷售點貼於產品上，能效等級/數值源自RS/IEC 62552試驗。盧旺達不設類似歐盟EPREL的集中式市場前產品註冊數據庫——盧旺達沒有在出貨前將每款型號連同機器可讀標籤文件預先在線上數據庫註冊的義務；能效聲明通過RSB合格評定/PVoC流程及實體標籤予以證實。標籤格式、等級標尺，以及某產品類別是否強制展示，應向RSB確認，因盧旺達通過EAC在區域層面協調器具標識，具體方案可能與歐盟A–G標籤及中國1–5級均不同。

standards_or_laws: Rwanda appliance energy label scheme (RSB / national energy programme) — physical label at point of sale; class/value derived from RS/IEC 62552 testing
RS/IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for the declared energy value
No EU-style EPREL pre-market registry — energy claim substantiated via RSB conformity assessment / PVoC and the physical label

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision). The CEL displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption, administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS). China self-declares the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing and uses a national label-filing/registration system, but it is a domestic instrument; the Chinese CEL graphic and grade are not the Rwanda label and cannot be displayed in place of a Rwanda-required label.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施。CEL展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量，由中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。中国依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级，并使用国家标识备案/注册系统，但其为国内工具；中国CEL图形及等级并非卢旺达标签，不能替代卢旺达要求的标签展示。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施。CEL展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量，由中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。中國依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級，並使用國家標識備案/註冊系統，但其為國內工具；中國CEL圖形及等級並非盧旺達標籤，不能替代盧旺達要求的標籤展示。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two points: (1) No EPREL-style pre-registration — unlike the EU, Rwanda imposes no obligation to pre-register each model in a centralised online database with a machine-readable label file before shipment; the energy claim is carried by the RSB conformity assessment / PVoC and the physical label, which is administratively lighter than the EU regime. (2) Label substitution — where a Rwanda energy label is required, the Chinese CEL graphic cannot be reused; the exporter must apply the Rwanda label format with values derived from IEC 62552 testing. Because the scheme's mandatory scope, format, and class scale for refrigerators may differ from both the EU and China, the exporter should confirm with RSB whether a label is required for the specific product and obtain the current template before printing artwork.
gap.zh: 两点：（1）无类似EPREL的预注册——与欧盟不同，卢旺达不要求在出货前将每款型号连同机器可读标签文件预先在集中式在线数据库注册；能效声明由RSB合格评定/PVoC及实体标签承载，在行政上比欧盟制度更轻。（2）标签替换——在要求卢旺达能效标签的情况下，中国CEL图形不能复用；出口商须采用卢旺达标签格式，数值源自IEC 62552试验。由于该方案对电冰箱的强制范围、格式及等级标尺可能与欧盟和中国均不同，出口商应向RSB确认特定产品是否需要标签，并在制作图稿前取得现行模板。
gap.zht: 兩點：（1）無類似EPREL的預註冊——與歐盟不同，盧旺達不要求在出貨前將每款型號連同機器可讀標籤文件預先在集中式線上數據庫註冊；能效聲明由RSB合格評定/PVoC及實體標籤承載，在行政上比歐盟制度更輕。（2）標籤替換——在要求盧旺達能效標籤的情況下，中國CEL圖形不能複用；出口商須採用盧旺達標籤格式，數值源自IEC 62552試驗。由於該方案對電冰箱的強制範圍、格式及等級標尺可能與歐盟和中國均不同，出口商應向RSB確認特定產品是否需要標籤，並在製作圖稿前取得現行模板。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — where a Rwanda appliance energy label applies, physical display with IEC 62552-derived values is required; there is NO EU-style EPREL pre-market registry obligation. Confirm mandatory scope and current label template with RSB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Rwanda has no EU-style EPREL pre-market registry — there is no obligation to pre-register each refrigerator model online before shipment; the energy claim is substantiated through RSB conformity assessment / PVoC and (where applicable) a physical Rwanda energy label with IEC 62552-derived values. The Chinese CEL graphic cannot serve as the Rwanda label. verified:false — confirm whether a label is mandatory for the specific product and obtain the current template from RSB.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达无类似欧盟的EPREL市场前注册数据库——无需在出货前将每款电冰箱型号在线预注册；能效声明通过RSB合格评定/PVoC及（在适用时）带IEC 62552数值的实体卢旺达能效标签予以证实。中国CEL图形不能充当卢旺达标签。verified:false——请向RSB确认特定产品是否强制需要标签并取得现行模板。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達無類似歐盟的EPREL市場前註冊數據庫——無需在出貨前將每款電冰箱型號線上預註冊；能效聲明通過RSB合格評定/PVoC及（在適用時）帶IEC 62552數值的實體盧旺達能效標籤予以證實。中國CEL圖形不能充當盧旺達標籤。verified:false——請向RSB確認特定產品是否強制需要標籤並取得現行模板。
